pipelines.name: agent-upgrade
pipelines.description: 5-phase pipeline for systematically improving an existing agent or skill:
pipelines.chain: AUDIT → DIFF → PLAN → IMPLEMENT → RE-EVALUATE

pipelines.name: article-evaluation-pipeline
pipelines.description: Wabi-sabi-aware 4-phase article evaluation: Fetch, Validate, Analyze,
pipelines.chain: FETCH → VALIDATE → ANALYZE → REPORT

pipelines.name: auto-pipeline
pipelines.description: Automatic pipeline generation for unrouted tasks. Two tiers: Tier 1 classifies
pipelines.chain: DEDUP CHECK → CHAIN SELECTION → CONTEXT CHECK → CRYSTALLIZE → EPHEMERAL EXECUTE

pipelines.name: chain-composer
pipelines.description: Compose valid pipeline chains from the step menu for each subdomain in a
pipelines.chain: LOAD → COMPOSE → VALIDATE → PRODUCE

pipelines.name: comprehensive-review
pipelines.description: Unified 3-wave code review: Wave 0 auto-discovers packages/modules and
pipelines.chain: SCOPE → WAVE 0 DISPATCH — PER-PACKAGE DEEP REVIEW → WAVE 0 AGGREGATE — PER-PACKAGE SUMMARY → WAVE 1 DISPATCH → WAVE 0+1 AGGREGATE → WAVE 2 DISPATCH → FULL AGGREGATE → FIX → REPORT

pipelines.name: de-ai-pipeline
pipelines.description: Scan-fix-verify loop for removing AI writing patterns from docs. Runs
pipelines.chain: SCAN → FIX → VERIFY → REPORT

pipelines.name: do-perspectives
pipelines.description: Inline multi-perspective analysis: 10 analytical lenses applied sequentially
pipelines.chain: VALIDATE INPUTS → MULTI-PERSPECTIVE ANALYSIS → SYNTHESIZE → APPLY → VERIFY AND REPORT

pipelines.name: doc-pipeline
pipelines.description: Structured 5-phase documentation pipeline: Research, Outline, Generate,
pipelines.chain: RESEARCH → OUTLINE → GENERATE → VERIFY → OUTPUT

pipelines.name: domain-research
pipelines.description: Discover and classify subdomains within a target domain for pipeline generation.
pipelines.chain: DISCOVER → CLASSIFY → MAP → PRODUCE

pipelines.name: explore-pipeline
pipelines.description: Systematic codebase exploration pipeline with parallel subagents and
pipelines.chain: SCAN → MAP → ANALYZE → COMPILE → ASSESS → SYNTHESIZE → REFINE → REPORT

pipelines.name: github-profile-rules
pipelines.description: Extract programming rules and coding conventions from a GitHub user's public
pipelines.chain: ADR → FETCH → RESEARCH → SAMPLE → COMPILE → GENERATE → VALIDATE → OUTPUT

pipelines.name: hook-development-pipeline
pipelines.description: Formal 5-phase pipeline for creating production-quality hooks with mandatory
phases: HOOK-DEVELOPMENT-ENGINEER PRODUCES HOOK WITHOUT LAZY IMPORTS
pipelines.chain: SPEC → IMPLEMENT → TEST → REGISTER → DOCUMENT → PERFORMANCE GATE FAILS → NON-BLOCKING GATE FAILS → JSON PARSE FAILS ON SETTINGS.JSON → HOOK-DEVELOPMENT-ENGINEER PRODUCES HOOK WITHOUT LAZY IMPORTS

pipelines.name: mcp-pipeline-builder
pipelines.description: Convert any repository into a registered MCP server: ANALYZE → DESIGN →
pipelines.chain: ANALYSIS ERRORS → DESIGN ERRORS → VALIDATION ERRORS → EVALUATION ERRORS → REGISTRATION ERRORS

pipelines.name: perses-dac-pipeline
pipelines.description: Dashboard-as-Code pipeline: initialize CUE or Go module with percli dac setup,
pipelines.chain: INITIALIZE → DEFINE → BUILD → VALIDATE → DEPLOY → CI/CD INTEGRATION

pipelines.name: perses-plugin-pipeline
pipelines.description: End-to-end Perses plugin development pipeline: SCAFFOLD, SCHEMA, IMPLEMENT, TEST,
pipelines.chain: SCAFFOLD → SCHEMA → IMPLEMENT → TEST → BUILD → DEPLOY

pipelines.name: pipeline-retro
pipelines.description: Trace pipeline test failures to generator root causes and propose fixes using
pipelines.chain: INGEST → TRACE → PROPOSE → REGENERATE → REPORT

pipelines.name: pipeline-scaffolder
pipelines.description: Scaffold pipeline components from a Pipeline Spec JSON: N subdomain skills,
pipelines.chain: LOAD → SCAFFOLD AGENT → SCAFFOLD SKILLS → INTEGRATE → REPORT

pipelines.name: pipeline-test-runner
pipelines.description: Test generated pipeline skills against real targets. Discovers test targets
pipelines.chain: DISCOVER TARGETS → EXECUTE → VALIDATE OUTPUTS → REPORT

pipelines.name: pr-pipeline
pipelines.description: End-to-end pipeline for creating pull requests: Classify Repo, Stage,
pipelines.chain: CLASSIFY REPO → PREFLIGHT CHECKLIST → STAGE → REVIEW → COMMIT → PUSH → REVIEW-FIX LOOP → RETRO → ADR VALIDATION → CREATE PR → VERIFY → CLEANUP

pipelines.name: research-pipeline
pipelines.description: Formal 5-phase research pipeline with artifact saving and source quality gates:
pipelines.chain: SCOPE → GATHER → SYNTHESIZE → VALIDATE → DELIVER

pipelines.name: research-to-article
pipelines.description: Multi-agent research pipeline for voice content generation. Parallel
pipelines.chain: GATHER → COMPILE → GROUND → GENERATE → VALIDATE → OUTPUT

pipelines.name: skill-creation-pipeline
pipelines.description: Formal 5-phase pipeline for creating new skills with quality gates:
pipelines.chain: DISCOVER → DESIGN → SCAFFOLD → VALIDATE → INTEGRATE

pipelines.name: system-upgrade
pipelines.description: Systematic 6-phase pipeline for adapting agents, skills, hooks, and scripts to
pipelines.chain: CHANGELOG → AUDIT → PLAN → IMPLEMENT → VALIDATE → DEPLOY

pipelines.name: voice-calibrator
pipelines.description: Analyze writing samples and extract voice patterns to create or update
pipelines.chain: VOICE GROUNDING → VOICE METRICS → THINKING PATTERNS

pipelines.name: voice-writer
pipelines.description: Unified voice content generation pipeline with mandatory validation and
pipelines.chain: LOAD → GROUND → GENERATE → VALIDATE → REFINE → JOY-CHECK → OUTPUT → CLEANUP

pipelines.name: workflow-orchestrator
pipelines.description: Three-phase task orchestration: BRAINSTORM requirements and approaches,
pipelines.chain: BRAINSTORM → WRITE-PLAN → VALIDATE-PLAN → EXECUTE-PLAN
